payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Small dark brown wooden side table/cabinet with a single paneled door, a narrow drawer above, and two round knobs; molded base and rectangular vertical form with a glossy finish, mostly fully visible in the crop (approx. 0.8 m from camera).
